messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-584 — Stale approval-ask email escalation — an unanswered Approvals-topic ask emails the human a digest with a Telegram deep link to that exact message
Approval context: Nothing about the mechanism is novel — the intake named the pieces to reuse and
they all exist. What needs your sign-off is the five judgement calls I made on
the questions the intake left open, and the one place I departed from what the
intake assumed:

1. THRESHOLD 2 hours, COOLDOWN 4 hours (both…
BL-584 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-584" (or "reject BL-584 <reason>") to act.
